title: Borehole equipment donated by Gift of the Givers
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY  NEWS - Bitou's water supply system received a welcome boost from the Gift of the Givers organisation - equipment to refurbish four boreholes that will mean delaying the onset of Day Zero for the municipality.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou's water supply system received a welcome boost from the Gift of the Givers organisation - equipment to refurbish four boreholes that will mean delaying the onset of Day Zero for the municipality."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The equipment, including computer controls, pipes and pumps, was handed to the municipality by Gift of the Givers local representative Mario Ferreira on 28 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The reactivation of four boreholes in the Harkerville and Plettenberg Bay areas was made possible by sponsorship from the Shoprite Group, along with their partners, the Gift of the Givers.","html":"The reactivation of four boreholes in the Harkerville and Plettenberg Bay areas was made possible by sponsorship from the Shoprite Group, along with their partners, the Gift of the Givers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This project will provide residents with reliable access to drinking water while contributing to efforts aimed at mitigating the risk of a potential Day Zero,\" said Sanjeev Raghubir, chief sustainability officer of the Shoprite Group.","html":"\"This project will provide residents with reliable access to drinking water while contributing to efforts aimed at mitigating the risk of a potential Day Zero,\" said Sanjeev Raghubir, chief sustainability officer of the Shoprite Group."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The boreholes, according to water manager Eddie Oosthuizen, will provide 800 000 litres per day towards Bitou's total 10ML water supply. \"Not enough, but it's a positive step,\" he said.","html":"The boreholes, according to water manager Eddie Oosthuizen, will provide 800 000 litres per day towards Bitou's total 10ML water supply. \"Not enough, but it's a positive step,\" he said."},{"type":"heading","text":"Beginning","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ferreira said the Gift of the Givers responded to a call for assistance from the municipality and the GRDM disaster management unit to find a long-term solution to bolster the 40-day window period to prevent Day Zero from happening,","html":"Ferreira said the Gift of the Givers responded to a call for assistance from the municipality and the GRDM disaster management unit to find a long-term solution to bolster the 40-day window period to prevent Day Zero from happening,"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bitou Mayor Jessica Kam-kam, along with council leadership, councillors and municipal officials, attended the handover of the equipment at the Plettenberg Bay water purification facility."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kamkam said she hoped this partnership with Gift of the Givers was \"only the beginning\" and thanked Shoprite for its contribution to the community.","html":"Kamkam said she hoped this partnership with Gift of the Givers was \"only the beginning\" and thanked Shoprite for its contribution to the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Borehole equipment donated by Gift of the Givers
